Configuration.Expression: IF CONTAINS([_CurrentFieldName_],"CAH_SALES") AND ((ISNULL([_CurrentField_]) OR ISEMPTY([_CurrentField_]))) THEN 0 ELSE [_CurrentField_] ENDIF

Field.name: DETAIL_Average_occupancy_rate_for_the_facility
Field.source: CrossTab:Header:detail_desc:Average occupancy rate for the facility:Sum:

Field.name: DETAIL_Number_of_MCR__Title_XVIII__inpatient_days
Field.source: CrossTab:Header:detail_desc:Number of MCR (Title XVIII) inpatient days:Sum:

Field.name: DETAIL_Percentage_that_Medpar_represents_of_total_discharges
Field.source: CrossTab:Header:detail_desc:Percentage that Medpar represents of total discharges:Sum:

Field.name: DETAIL_Total_patients_discharged_from_hospital_in_a_12_month_period__Exclude_SNF__NF__Observation__Hospice_
Field.source: CrossTab:Header:detail_desc:Total patients discharged from hospital in a 12-month period (Exclude SNF, NF, Observation, Hospice):Sum:

Field.name: SpatialObj
Field.source: Formula: IF IsNull([Z9_Point]) THEN [SpatialObj] ELSE [Z9_Point] ENDIF

Field.name: 360AccountKey
Field.source: File: odbc:DSN=Prod - MasterProduction|||select AnalyticsGateway.dbo.CustomerMaster.* from AnalyticsGateway.dbo.CustomerMaster

Field.name: SPECLevel5
Field.source: File: odbc:DSN=Prod - MasterProduction|||select AnalyticsGateway.dbo.CustomerMaster.* from AnalyticsGateway.dbo.CustomerMaster

FormulaField.expression: if [CrosswalkSource] = "CCA" then "2" elseif [CrosswalkSource] = "MDM" then "3" elseif [CrosswalkSource] = "BSM" then "1" else "4" endif
